case_title: JOSE ERNESTO MENDOZA VS. LORENZO MARC SAGABAEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-21-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
